main_material:
Celestial Steel - Makai_Ingot Stardust - Makai_Stardust placbo universal fuel Celestial Fabric - Makai_Fabric_C a piece of fabric originate from Makai, also known as Star Cradle. extremely high heat resist. immune even. one of the needed material to create Primodial Forge. Thing made from Celestial Fabric will never burn. Flame of the First Forge - Makai_Forge_Flame endgame item. a universal fuel althought not all building can utilize it full power efficiently. mostly non-makai building. Primodial Forge Miniature star - Makai_StarSmall a miniature star keep contained in a specialized container
</>Makai Interdimensional Relay - Makai_Bench Interdimension Receiver - Makai_En_Reciever recieve raw energy from Makai Makai Energy Converter - Makai_En_Condens convert raw energy into usable power. in a form of raw star particle Stardust Particle Collecter - Makai_St_Conv convert star particle into Stardust Celestial Steel Forge - Makai_Cs_Forg convert star particle into Celestial Steel
</>Celestial Wall - MakainiumWall
</>Makai Interdimensional Uplink - Makai_Powerlink_Relay research bench linkable
</>Stardust-particle accelerator - Makai_Turret_A Stardust-beam compresser - Makai_Turret_B
Sun Cradle - Makai_SunC lategame power production. a miniature sun, right in your backyard
Primodial Forge - Makai_PForge a forge created in the image of The First Forge, and inherit part of it power. it had forged a foundation for all thing that exist. and that yet to exist. those who control the Primodial Forge, control the very foundation of the universe. \n your colony has come far to reach this point. only thing limiting you at this point is the pawn own imagination. any material can be forged here, even those that yet to exist in our world. \n\n Think of this forge as a source of infinite resource, support quite a few modden material(more can be added based on request)
</>Entity Null </>Order </>Knowledge Seeker </>Existence Collapsed Will Frigid Star Sunblade Star Mace Destined Death
</>Bracelet of Knowledge Ring of bond Ring of Lightning Ring of Absolute Order
Droplet of miracle
Concept Destruction - Conceptual_Destruction Entity Null Concept Null - Conceptual_Null Existence Cease Thinking - Knowledge_Stolen Knowledge Seeker Varia's Blessing - Mak_Var_Bless Bracelet of Knowledge
- needed to make Primodial Forge. each essence is used to make it own related item Essence of Corruption - Makai_C-Path_E Insanity related item Essence of Bond - Makai_B-Path_E Social boost related item Essence of Fate - Makai_F-Path_E Healing related item Essence of Knowledge - Makai_K-Path_E Research speed boost Essence of Frost - Makai_Fr-Path_E temperature control building. cold Essence of Flame Makai_Fla-Path_E temperature control building. hot Essence of Existence - Makai_E-Path_E IDM. self healing speed. Essence of Destruction- Makai_D-Path_E mitigate enemies defense. and increase their IDM. Essence of Order - Makai_Or-Path_E keep thing tidy. reduce mental break threshold. Slave no longer rebel. increase psyfocus gain. Essence of Death - Makai_Dea-Path_E Deadly 13th. a countdown hediff that will kill a pawn in 13 days. Essence of Distortion - Makai_Dis-Path_E undecided.
Essence of Beyond - Makai_SNS-Path_E SNS compat support. crafted from 1_Eternium 1_Stable Matter Essence of Archotech - Makai_MAG-Path_E More Archotech Garbage patch. crafted with 250 ArchoMass and 25 ArchoFragment Essence of Glitter - Makai_GT-Path_E Glitter Tech patch. crafted with 100 Alpha Poly and 100 Beta Poly. Essence of Infinity - Makai_Ducks-Path_E Duck's Insane skill patch. require pawn with 25 or more crafting to craft Essence of The Deep - Makai_Moyo-Path_E Moyo-From the depth patch. require 500 Abyssal Steel to craft Essence of Warfare - Makai_VFEM-Path_E Vanilla Faction Expanded Mechanoid patch. require 100 Mechanoid Component to craft. Essence of Desire - Makai_De-Path_E Simple Warrant patch. no, you don't get to warrant for all other essence for cheap. now pay up. this one cost 10k silver. (100k if any of the infinite resource mod is active. including Mines2.0/Planetary Drill/Omni Core Drill Essence of Lust - Makai_RJW-Path_E RJW patch. not required to make the forge, basically a reskinned fertility pill. you WILL have more kids.
Collapsed Will - Melee weapon,Claw shape,each hit give a build-up hediff. max sev = go berserk Pillar of maddness - a pillar with 5x5 maddness radius. *warning* affect ally. Nightmare Claw - turret that shoot claw-like projectile. apply stacking hediff that caused berserk.
Ring of bond - wearer gain increased social boost. Pillar of communication - 5x5 radius social boost. Bond Forge - a building that give nearby pawn mood boost
Convergence of Fate - Building that give immunity gain speed and injury healing speed. Droplet of miracle - Consumable, massive boost to healing and immunity gain speed in a short amount of time.(5s)
Varia Bracelet - Increase research speed and learning speed. some boost to global work speed. Knowledge Seeker - Bow that increase user learning speed. precise aim.
Frigid Star - Staff weapon. considered as ranged. shoot cold orb that inflic hyperthemia and unique debuff. Cold Slumber - a building that cool down room. give hypothemia hediff in a 2x2 radius, plan carefully.
Sunblade - Flame sword. deal heat damage. make user immune to heat. can shoot fireball Passioned Flame - a building that heat up room. give heatstroke hediff in 2x2 radius, plan carefully. Star Mace - similar to Sun Cradle. an miniature sun, but even smaller and more dense. melt target armor. and set them on fire. can shoot fireball.
Existence(the weapon) - Halberd that give user massive boost to healing ability. reduce pain they feel. Guidance Light - pillar with 3x3 radius buff range. make pawn take less damage, very expensive.
Entity Null - Gigantic sword. shoot lightning. nullify enemies defense. and increase target IDM. Ring of Lightning - a lightning ring that periodically shoot at enemies. give move speed increase. Storm Caller - a big pillar that act as turret. shoot Lightning.
Order(the weapon) - a big halberd. reduce wearer mental break threshold. increase psyfocus gain. reduce psycast heat gain. Ring of Absolute Order - given to slave. 100% Slave Suppression Offset.
Destined Death - a big scythe. insanely high armor pen. but deal no damage. on hit give a stacking hediff, once reach full severity victim will die in 13 days. The Death Reversed - 13 use resurrecter. no drawback
